summary: Recent updates in the Utils area of Firefox focused on improving internal logging and video processing. One important change was the removal of an incorrect assertion related to the HasVideo() function when reporting the video resize profiler marker, which helps developers accurately track video performance metrics. Additionally, parts of the system have been updated to utilize **MOZ_LOG_FMT**, a standardized logging format, improving consistency across video capabilities and image capture functions. These changes are significant as they enhance the developer experience and contribute to more reliable video handling in the browser.
